# Daily Report — 2026-06-20

## Task Completed
Added `list_change_risk_assessments` tool — queries the `risk_assessment` table scoped to `source_table=change_request`. Accepts optional `change_id` (CHG number or sys_id, auto-resolved) and `state` (draft/pending/complete) filters with full pagination (`has_more`/`next_offset`). New `_format_risk_assessment()` helper normalises reference fields (source, questionnaire, result, risk) to display values. Registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` packages; exported from `tools/__init__.py` and `__all__`.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1727
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Known pre-existing vulnerabilities in system packages (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) — none in project code.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — added `list_change_risk_assessments` import and `__all__` entry
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — added `ListChangeRiskAssessmentsParams` and `list_change_risk_assessments_tool` imports; registered `list_change_risk_assessments` in TOOLS dict
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `list_change_risk_assessments` to `change_coordinator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_list_change_risk_assessments.py` — 18 new tests
